item.dc:creator: Yoda1PositivityStar

item.title: 7/7/22 freedom
item.description: Thursday I had to make the decision to leave. My husband of 13 years was not a man I recognized, he was paranoid, controlling and began destroying property and spending all the money. I brought the cops out for an involuntary mental admittance and they found meth on him. That was it. That was the cause of my year from hell. Restraining order is up, he is gone. Now my job is to get out of the financial ruin he left me in. Fixing the property he destroyed, and repairing the relationships with people I was not allowed to talk to. Mainly loving myself again and that I was not the problem or cause. It has been freeing to be able to openly talk to people without fear that my phone would be smashed or my cars interior would be slashed up more.
item.dc:creator: mentallydrowning

item.title: Come on Florida, you can do this. #NoDeSantis

item.title: I present to you: The River Runner
item.description: By popular demand on this post from yesterday (https://imgur.com/gallery/XlZrDTP), I wanted to share with you a website where you can place a raindrop anywhere in the continental US and follow it to the sea. @pistrisca @PineappleIsDeliciousOnPizzaFightMe https://river-runner.samlearner.com FP Edit: Woohoo! Pls send pics of cute cats!

item.title: Just more enraging pictures from the Uvalde surveillance video.
item.description:
Punisher Lock Screen douchebag.
Well there it is, the most disturbing sentence I’ve read all year.
Hand sanitizer: For when you need to clean the blood of children off your hands.
Not one, but two motherfuckers on their phones.
WHAT POSSIBLE FUCKING REASON IS HE LAUGHING FOR?
It’s been two months now and every new piece of info keeps burying these Uvalde cops into the hole that they dug for themselves. https://twitter.com/jenny2x4/status/1547087502518865921?s=21&t=31lJ6yyXLZyjN4OcUzqhEQ
item.dc:creator: tfon12

item.title: Prime Bezos' Wallet Day is more like it
item.description: Some small businesses list on Amazon just to be found. Ships/Sold By Amazon: Amazon purchased this wholesale and is reselling. Ships from Amazon, sold by XYZ: XYZ is paying Amazon to stock and deliver their products. Ships/Sold By XYZ: Third party seller listing on Amazon. They pay a fee to Amazon on sales. These are the small businesses that need your support.
item.dc:creator: SpecialBrownies

item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: Coming out as trans at work and publicly tomorrow. Wish me luck?
item.description: Figured I was actually a lady (albeit a foul-mouthed one) three years ago. Tomorrow I'm finally sharing this fact with everyone at work, as well as the public, after having been closely closeted for a while. Excuse the crap stress doodle art. Wish me luck? I rarely post anything, but figured this was the sort of thing a good millenial should post about the night before the fact. In 9h, if all goes well, my new name will be updated to the company's systems, and I'll send an email explaining why my name's suddenly different in our chat client and so forth. Then cometh ye olde coming out post on social media. I'm pretty excited, but nervous. Hiding who you are can feel like the safest thing to do, but most of the time it takes more energy than being yourself. Anyways, be good to eachother!
item.dc:creator: BitchCake
